ham.subject: Out of Office: Shukriya, I will reply soon
ham.body:
Hi team,

Thanks for reaching out. I am currently out of the office traveling for the annual conference in Goa. I will be back on 15th June and will get back to you as soon as I am back.

In the meantime, for any urgent queries related to the project, please feel free to contact my colleague, Rajesh Kumar, at rajesh.kumar@example.com.

Thanks for your understanding.

Best regards,

Suman Patel

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Gift Card Verification Needed
spam.body:
Dear Suman,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to you under urgent circumstances. Our company’s CEO, Mr. Anil Kapoor, has requested immediate verification of a gift card that was recently sent to your department.

Please note that this is a top‑priority matter and the CEO has specifically asked for a confirmation email from you within the next 30 minutes. The gift card is a part of a company incentive program and any delay may result in a financial penalty.

To verify the gift card, simply click on the link below and complete the short form:
<URL>

Once you have submitted the confirmation, please reply to this email with the confirmation number and a brief note that the card has been verified.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

Rahul Mehta
Chief Operations Officer
XYZ Ltd.
